The '''''Inflexible''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].

==History==
It was constructed at the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] shipyards on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. [[Shannon Voorson]] was able to slice its name along with several other Star Destroyers names and gave it to her cousin, [[Deen Voorson]], a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="Slaying Dragons">{{JournalCite|9|Slaying Dragons}}</ref>

The ''Inflexible'' also hosted the [[TIE training school|Tir training school]], a training center for [[TIE pilot]]s. [[Flight Captain]] [[T. Alvak]] was one of the pilots trained on the ''Inflexible''.<ref name="Star Wars Sourcebook">''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''</ref>
